headline: Energy Stocks Have Lost Steam. These Could Still Rise.
summary: Wall Street sees more gains ahead for companies that can help protect against future energy shocks like this one.

headline: Baker Hughes (BKR) Secures Major Order With San Matias Pipeline
summary: Baker Hughes Co. (NASDAQ:BKR) is one of the 10 best oil and gas equipment & services stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 7, San Matias Pipeline placed a major equipment order with Baker Hughes Co. (NASDAQ:BKR). According to the agreement, it will supply three different gas compression units for a major natural […]
